      • [ - ] haunani - member since 21-Nov-25

        Chelsea have been a bit inconsistent recently, with some hard‑fought results and moments where their build‑up hasn’t always produced clear chances. Bournemouth’s form has also been mixed, and they tend to stay compact off the ball and look to push forward more directly when they win possession. In their recent meetings Chelsea usually have more of the ball, while Bournemouth focus on staying organised and making the most of their forward moments.
